---
title: "Distributions & Uncertainty"
subtitle: "Why the average lies, and how to show variance honestly"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: patterns-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, categories, description]
---

::: {.section-label}
Analysis Playbook · Distributions & Uncertainty
:::

When the mean hides the story — distributions over point estimates, error bars that
mean something, and how to put uncertainty on a chart without losing the room.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**🚧 In progress** — entries coming soon.
:::

::: {#patterns-listing}
:::
